initial_entry.name: Graph Type to Search
initial_entry.author: Jeonghyeon Park
initial_entry.description: Type-ahead in the graph view: start typing while the graph is focused to filter, and draw a highlight ring around nodes whose title matches. Optionally keep every node visible and only ring the matches. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
